narrative:
Summit County has 370,098 registered voters, with 56.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 16.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 26.9%, a clear Democratic lean of 10.0 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 28.0% of registrants.
